title: carex × pauliana
intro: Carex × pauliana, a hybrid plant of Carex aquatilis and Carex limosa, is a type of sedge that is commonly found in wetland areas. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The health benefits of Carex × pauliana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be dried and used in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
